  So tungsten keeps a double history bright:
  One name of stone, one sign of light.

  O metal, tempered, dense, and strong,
  You hold the heat and teach spark its song.
  Beneath our lamps, within the forge’s white,
  You bear the fire and do not yield night.


› Use /skills to list available skills

  gpt-5.5 high · ~/github/Minerva/src
